title: How to Stay Calm in a Fight
description:
#shorts 
How to Stay Calm:
Recognising What role YOU played in a bad situatio, is the quickest way to collect yourself. 💭✨❤️
We often forget that action and reaction, cause and effect are a game of ping-pong 💬
It’s almost always a two-way street. 🤷🏻‍♀️
If you have found yourself blowing up uncontrollably when something bad happens and then regret it later wishing you stayed calmer and more collected. 🕊

.
.

.
